nasb.text: It came about when he had finished presenting the tribute, that he sent away the people who had carried the tribute.

esv.text: And when Ehud had finished presenting the tribute, he sent away the people who carried the tribute.

cnv.text: 以笏獻完了貢物，就把抬貢物的眾人打發走了。

ccb.text: 以笏献上了贡物之后，便和抬贡物的人一起离去。
